description_long: This rifle features a robust, matte-black metal body with a fixed wooden stock and a prominent, detachable box magazine. The barrel is straight and standard in length, with a bayonet or blade-style muzzle device attached at the front. The trigger guard is rounded, and the grip is ergonomically shaped, likely made of the same dark wood as the stock. The upper receiver has a simple iron sight system, and the charging handle is visible on the right side. The overall design is reminiscent of classic military rifles, combining both wood and metal elements for durability and function.
description: A matte-black rifle with a fixed wooden stock, detachable box magazine, and a bayonet-style muzzle device, featuring iron sights and a robust metal body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, metal receiver, detachable magazine, and bayonet-style muzzle device.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle device, iron sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, detachable magazine, and bayonet-style muzzle device from the left.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the iron sights along the top of the receiver.
